ns0:entry.ns0:title: Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
Language: python
Use claude code, codex or pi for free from the terminal, IDE, or you phone like OpenClaw (voice supported)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AstrBotDevs/AstrBot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AstrBotDevs/AstrBot
Language: python
AI Agent Assistant & development framework that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Canner/WrenAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Canner/WrenAI
Language: python
GenBI (Generative BI) for AI agents, an open-source, governed text-to-SQL through an open context layer that turns natural-language questions into trusted dashboards, charts, and SQL across 20+ data sources, such as BigQuery, Snowflake, PostgreSQL, ClickHouse, Amazon Redshift, Databricks and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MoonshotAI/kimi-cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MoonshotAI/kimi-cli
Language: python
Kimi Code CLI is your next CLI agent.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PostHog/posthog
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PostHog/posthog
Language: python
🦔 PostHog is the leading platform for building self-driving products. Our developer tools – AI observability, analytics, session replay, flags, experiments, error tracking, logs, and more – capture all the context agents need to diagnose problems, uncover opportunities, and ship fixes. Steer it all from Slack, web, desktop, or the MCP.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PrefectHQ/fastmcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PrefectHQ/fastmcp
Language: python
🚀 The fast, Pythonic way to build MCP servers and clients.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Robbyant/lingbot-map
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Robbyant/lingbot-map
Language: python
A feed-forward 3D foundation model for reconstructing scenes from streaming data

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kvcache-ai/ktransformers
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kvcache-ai/ktransformers
Language: python
A Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lingfengQAQ/webnovel-writer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lingfengQAQ/webnovel-writer
Language: python
基于 Claude Code 的长篇网文辅助创作系统，解决 AI 写作中的「遗忘」和「幻觉」问题，支持 200 万字量级 连载创作。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: megadose/holehe
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/megadose/holehe
Language: python
holehe allows you to check if the mail is used on different sites like twitter, instagram and will retrieve information on sites with the forgotten password function.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
Language: python
Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tirth8205/code-review-graph
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tirth8205/code-review-graph
Language: python
Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: topoteretes/cognee
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/topoteretes/cognee
Language: python
Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine.
